notes: Solid single-player Pong implementation with AI opponent, sound effects, pause/restart, and win condition — minor deduction for no two-player mode and slightly unconventional control mapping (Up/Down moves player 1 alongside W/S).
Excellent implementation with a complete game loop, scaling difficulty, and audio, though paddle collision uses point-based Y-checking which can cause clipping at the very edges of the paddles.
A solid single-player Pong with scoring, pause, restart, and AI, but it is not true two-player Pong and the mixed W/S plus Arrow-key mapping for one paddle is a notable control/design flaw.
